notes: Portfolio Value (Shares tab) now totals every holding, full stop \u2014 it no longer hides holdings you've excluded from Net Worth. Net Worth keeps respecting each item's include/exclude checkbox. Added a tap-for-info icon on both totals explaining the difference.

Fixed share holdings silently counting as $0 toward Net Worth everywhere \u2014 the Net Worth total, the combined multi-profile total, cloud sync's snapshot total, the Shares section subtotal, and the sort order all read a field shares never populate. They now use each share's real qty \u00d7 price.

Balance's roll-up number animation (Overview hero) now also plays for the Net Worth total and for each profile's balance in the Combined Profiles screen \u2014 previously only Balance animated when its value changed.
